case_title: ANGELA ALLEN VS. CHRISTINA PACHO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---CLINTON WU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY ALLEN, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT PACHO, CHRISTINA WU, JIAN HAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAY-09-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WU, JIAN HAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAY-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PACHO, CHRISTINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEN, ANGELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACHO, CHRISTINA $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JIAN HAN WU (AKA JIAN HUA WU) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, ANGELA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PACHO, CHRISTINA
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JIAN HAN WU BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-25-2013 AT 10:00 AM.
